hotels.name: Grand Candi Hotel Semarang
hotels.description: Premium five-star hotel at Jl. Sisingamangaraja No.16, Semarang. Executive lounge, conference facilities, and English-speaking staff suitable for buyer meetings.

hotels.name: Hotel Ciputra Semarang
hotels.description: Five-star hotel at Simpang Lima with rooftop dining, meeting rooms, and reliable airport transfer arrangements.

hotels.name: Patra Semarang Hotel & Convention
hotels.description: Four-star hotel on Jl. Sisingamangaraja with on-site convention facilities — popular for sample-evaluation visits.

hotels.name: Hotel Santika Premiere Semarang
hotels.description: Four-star hotel on Jl. Pandanaran in central Semarang with reliable Wi-Fi and walkable cafés.

hotels.name: Hotel Neo Candi Simpang Lima Semarang
hotels.description: Three-star hotel on Jl. S. Parman — clean rooms, complimentary breakfast, suitable for short pre-shipment inspection trips.
